title: Solutions Architect | Technical Manager
description:
Solutions Architect
  • Provide technical leadership across teams, ensuring the use of best practices in development and deployment processes.
  • Architect Azure-hosted software solutions, optimizing for reliability, cost-efficiency, and security. Utilize services like App Service Environments, Container Apps, Service Bus, Key Vault, Private Endpoints, VPN Gateways, and Azure Defender.
  • Implement Agile & DevOps principles within teams by promoting code quality, peer reviews, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code assets (Bicep, ARM templates).
  • Prepare and deploy cloud migrations, and upgrade .NET and Single Page Application (SPA) framework versions.
  • Analyze business requirements to provide functional specifications.
Technical Manager
  • Develop proposal documents with architectural design diagrams during pre-sales.
  • Estimate delivery timelines, plan teams, and determine sales prices for pre-sales proposals.
  • Focus on team satisfaction across projects.
  • Develop training plans for team members.
  • Analyze potential candidates' resumes and conduct technical interviews.

title: Senior .NET Developer
description:
Architect, Tech Lead, System Designer, Developer of high-performance IT solutions are the main roles.

Accomplishments:
  • Designed a communication system for the banking sector using microservices and event-driven architecture on Azure and .NET.
  • Served as Tech Lead for a state machine system for a public entity, utilizing web apps and background processes on Azure and .NET.

title: Architect | Senior .NET Developer
description:
Architect, analyst, and developer specializing in the creation and maintenance of web and Windows applications.

Accomplishments:
  • Designed and implemented a state machine system for a public entity, comprised of web apps and background processes, using .NET Core in Azure.
  • Designed and implemented e-commerce web applications integrated with ERP customer systems, utilizing .NET Core technology.
  • Designed and implemented a fleet management system application using Microsoft technology (.NET Core and Bing Maps).
  • Designed and implemented customer self-service portals.
  • Designed and implemented middleware services for ERP systems using REST with .NET Core.
  • Improved the company product "Warehouse System Solution" by introducing new ideas and features, as well as resolving existing issues.

title: Analyst Programmer
description:
Responsible for creating web and Windows applications, maintaining existing Edigma products, and training new employees.

Accomplishments:
  • Designed and implemented web portals for e-commerce integrated with customer ERP systems.
  • Designed and implemented customer self-service portals integrated with ERP systems.
  • Maintained and improved the Edigma ERP product and Warehouse System Solution by introducing new ideas and features, as well as resolving existing issues.
